title: mean_reversion_oscillator param overrides
description: Validates the param_overrides map for any spec-driven strategy with archetype=mean_reversion_oscillator. Keys not listed here are rejected (additionalProperties=false) so a typo can never silently no-op.

rsiOversoldMax.description: RSI ceiling that qualifies as 'oversold' for long entries

rsiOverboughtMin.description: RSI floor that qualifies as 'overbought' for short entries
